text: Wandering these halls, I am enveloped in stark lines and gentle echoes. The emptiness invites contemplation, yet the sudden slant unsettles me, unbalancing my sense of place. As I approach the vibrant R+D display, curiosity stirs within—a counterpoint to the solitude earlier. Bright text and shifting screens challenge me to think: knowledge and innovation, always just beyond clear reach. Am I adrift or on the verge of discovery? I feel alert, yet slightly disoriented, poised between uncertainty and creative possibility.
